description_long: This serving tray is rectangular with a flat, black base and slightly raised edges on all sides, forming a shallow container. The tray is filled with a serving of reddish-orange sauced chicken pieces and a side of shredded cabbage and purple vegetables, suggesting it is used for food presentation. The tray's surface appears smooth and hard, likely made from plastic or a similar synthetic material, with a subtle sheen indicating a semi-glossy finish. The edges are straight and uniform, with no visible handles or decorative patterns, and the rim is modestly raised to prevent food from sliding off. The tray is utilitarian in design, focusing on functionality rather than ornamentation. No brand logos or maker's marks are visible on any side.
description: A rectangular black serving tray with raised edges, holding sauced chicken and shredded vegetables. The tray has a smooth, semi-glossy surface and a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tray's flat base, raised edges, and a clear view of the food arrangement with chicken on the left and vegetables on the right.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth of the tray and the separation between the chicken and vegetables, with the tray's edge visible in the foreground.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tray from the opposite side, with vegetables now on the left and chicken on the right, highlighting the uniform rim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tray's depth and the food arrangement from a different angle, with the raised edge prominent in the foreground.
attribute_rim_design: The rim is modestly raised, approximately 1-2 cm in height, with a uniform thickness and a flat, straight profile. There are no lips, grooves, or decorative elements.
attribute_reflective_properties: The surface of the tray is semi-glossy, exhibiting mild reflections and some highlights, especially on the flat base and rim. No mirror-like or highly glossy areas are present.
